svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 58, 92), rgb(167, 195, 224)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(13, 33, 55), rgb(196, 213, 232));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 230px; height: 1px; padding-top: 32px; margin-left: 275px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Impermanent loss realized (from tick deltas, no oracle)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(244, 226, 194), rgb(56, 40, 13)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(154, 106, 20), rgb(180, 139, 65));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 230px; height: 1px; padding-top: 155px; margin-left: 275px;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(45, 106, 74), rgb(120, 172, 144)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 64, 44), rgb(164, 200, 183));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 300px; margin-left: 5px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: YES — junior buffer absorbs full IL; senior untouched

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(45, 106, 74), rgb(120, 172, 144)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 64, 44), rgb(164, 200, 183));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 300px; margin-left: 505px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: NO — buffer drained to 0, shortfall remains

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 74, 138), rgb(142, 183, 239)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(13, 33, 55), rgb(196, 213, 232));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 430px; margin-left: 505px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;

div.div: Senior absorbs shortfall up to maxSeniorILExposureBps cap

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 560px; margin-left: 505px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;

div.div: Beyond cap: realized loss (documented worst case)

fill: light-dark(rgb(45, 106, 74), rgb(120, 172, 144)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(45, 106, 74), rgb(120, 172, 144));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 418px; height: 1px; padding-top: 397px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #52606D;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#52606D, #929eaa); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: The junior buffer is the only thing between a volatile market and senior principal. Any code path that can reduce it is reviewed against the coverage-ratio invariant before merge (golden rule 3).
